Class SwingAgiConfig.UITheme

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.SwingAgiConfig.UITheme
Enclosing class:
SwingAgiConfig
public static class SwingAgiConfig.UITheme extends Object
A collection of color and font definitions that define the visual identity of the Anahata Swing UI.
Author:
anahata

    Color
    getBorderColor(Role role)
    Gets the border color for a message panel based on the role.

    Gets the background color for the end of a message header (and content area) based on the role.

    Gets the foreground (text) color for a message header based on the role.

  • Method Details

    • getHeaderStartColor

      public Color getHeaderStartColor(Role role)
      Gets the background color for the start of a message header based on the role.
      Parameters:
      role - The actor's role.
      Returns:
      The header start color.

    • getHeaderEndColor

      public Color getHeaderEndColor(Role role)
      Gets the background color for the end of a message header (and content area) based on the role.
      Parameters:
      role - The actor's role.
      Returns:
      The header end color.

    • getHeaderForegroundColor

      public Color getHeaderForegroundColor(Role role)
      Gets the foreground (text) color for a message header based on the role.
      Parameters:
      role - The actor's role.
      Returns:
      The header text color.

    • getBorderColor

      public Color getBorderColor(Role role)
      Gets the border color for a message panel based on the role.
      Parameters:
      role - The actor's role.
      Returns:
      The border color.
